description.ja: 1つのエージェントによって公開またはキュレートされ、1つ以上の形式でアクセスまたはダウンロードできるデータの集合。
description.en: A conceptual entity that represents the information published.
description.it: Raccolta di dati, pubblicati o curati da un'unica fonte, disponibili per l'accesso o il download in uno o più formati.
description.es: Una colección de datos, publicados o conservados por una única fuente, y disponibles para ser accedidos o descargados en uno o más formatos.
description.fr: Une collection de données, publiée ou élaborée par une seule source, et disponible pour accès ou téléchargement dans un ou plusieurs formats.
description.el: Μία συλλογή από δεδομένα, δημοσιευμένη ή επιμελημένη από μία και μόνο πηγή, διαθέσιμη δε προς πρόσβαση ή μεταφόρτωση σε μία ή περισσότερες μορφές.
description.ar: قائمة بيانات منشورة أو مجموعة من قبل مصدر ما و متاح الوصول إليها أو تحميلها
description.da: En samling af data, udgivet eller udvalgt og arrangeret af en enkelt kilde og som er til råde for adgang til eller download af i en eller flere repræsentationer.

description.en: Physical person.

Represents a collection of people organized together into a community or other social, commercial or political structure. The group has some common purpose or reason for existence which goes beyond the set of people belonging to it and can act as an Agent. Organizations are often decomposable into hierarchical structures.
Terms of use defines overall conditions and rights regarding access and usage  of dataset.

usageNote.en: This represents a general availability of a dataset. It implies no information about the actual access method of the data, i.e., whether by direct download, API, or through a Web page. This is an abstract type. Use its subclasses to determine downloadable file or data service.

description.en: Class describing the result of validation testing. It may include validation of metadata, data and/or web services accessing the data.

usageNote.en: Recommended approach is to use controlled list values, preferably in the form of IRI.

Class is used for description of the resource together with the type of relation, for which is used value from codelist https://vocabs.ccmm.cz/registry/codelist/RelationType/. Distributions of the datasets SHALL NOT be modeled as related resource, but as a distribution. Use qualified resource property to link to the dataset class. 
Examples of resources: other related dataset, used methodology, instrument used for measurement, conference or conference paper etc...

description.en: Resource represents any resource, physical or digital, that is related to the described dataset.

usageNote.en: Use to characterize a relationship between resources and agents, where the nature of the relationship is known but is not adequately characterized by the standard DCTERMS properties (dcterms:hasPart, dcterms:isPartOf, dcterms:conformsTo, dcterms:isFormatOf, dcterms:hasFormat, dcterms:isVersionOf, dcterms:hasVersion, dcterms:replaces, dcterms:isReplacedBy, dcterms:references, dcterms:isReferencedBy, dcterms:requires, dcterms:isRequiredBy) or PROV-O properties (prov:wasDerivedFrom, prov:wasInfluencedBy, prov:wasQuotedFrom, prov:wasRevisionOf, prov:hadPrimarySource, prov:alternateOf, prov:specializationOf). Roles of the agent in the relation are specified using had role relation.

description.en: An association class for attaching additional information to a relationship between Resource and Agent.

usageNote.en: Use value from code list https://vocabs.ccmm.cz/registry/codelist/AgentRole/.

description.en: Role of the agent in the relationship to the resource.

usageNote.en: Describes contact details, such as telephone, e--mail address etc.

description.en: Details to contact the agent in a relationship to the resource.

usageNote.en: Address shall refer to the IRI identifier of an address from existing Address registry (e.g. RÚIAN for Czechia). In cases, where address identifier does not exist or cannot be used, fill address details using class attributes.

description.en: A spatial object that in a human-readable way identifies a fixed location.

usageNote.en: In case metadata is harvested from external catalogue, metadata record IRI shall be the same as IRI of the metadata record in original repository.

description.ja: 1つのデータセットを記述したデータ・カタログ内のレコード。
description.en: Description of the metadata record of the dataset.
description.it: Un record in un catalogo di dati che descrive un singolo dataset o servizio di dati.
description.fr: Un registre du catalogue ou une entrée du catalogue, décrivant un seul jeu de données.
description.es: Un registro en un catálogo de datos que describe un solo conjunto de datos o un servicio de datos.
description.cs: Záznam v datovém katalogu popisující jednu datovou sadu či datovou službu.
description.el: Μία καταγραφή ενός καταλόγου, η οποία περιγράφει ένα συγκεκριμένο σύνολο δεδομένων.
description.da: En post i et datakatalog der beskriver registreringen af et enkelt datasæt eller en datatjeneste.

description.en: A standard or other specification to which a metadata record conforms.
Information about entities, activities, and people involved in producing a piece of data or thing.
Physical embodiment of the dataset in a particular format.
Physical embodiment of the dataset distribution as a particular data service.

usageNote.en: File is represented by URL on which is it accessable.

description.en: Digital resource representing collection of data.

usageNote.en: Use IRI value from registry https://www.iana.org/assignments/media-types/media-types.xhtml.

description.en: A file format.
A textual resource intended for human consumption that contains information about the data service.

usageNote.en: Subject scheme sets a contexts for all subjects within this scheme. It usually represents thesauri, vocabulary etc., but may also  represent a set of concepts with the meaning of the same context, such as domain specific nomenclature.

description.en: Collection of subjects (keywords, concepts, classification codes) curated by a single source.

usageNote.en:
Location is represented according to the Open Formal Standard for Spatial Data. Locations are represented as a reference to the named place, geographic region or specific geometry according to the standardized geometry object representation. 
Every Location instance must have at least one of the following attributes/relations: bbox, location name, geometry and/or related object identifier.

description.en: Spatial region, named place or geometry representation of a place related to the resource.
The Geometry class provides the means to identify a location as a point, line, polygon, etc. expressed using coordinates in some coordinate reference system.
Unique and resolvable identifier containing the notation and identifier scheme in the form of URI.
Alternate title of the resource.

usageNote.en: This class allows the results of a variety of checksum and cryptographic message digest algorithms to be represented.

description.en: Algorithm used for Checksums.

usageNote.en: A legal document giving official permission to do something with a resource.
Use value from codelist https://vocabs.ccmm.cz/registry/codelist/LocationRelation/.

description.en: Relation of the dataset to the resource.

usageNote.en: Use value from codelist https://vocabs.ccmm.cz/registry/codelist/AlternateTitle/.

description.en: Type of alternate title.

usageNote.en: Use value from codelist https://vocabs.ccmm.cz/registry/codelist/TimeReference/.

description.en: Type of a date in relation to the resource.

usageNote.en: Use IRI identifier of the resource type from the codelist https://vocabularies.coar-repositories.org/resource_types/.

description.en: Type of the resource.

usageNote.en: Use value from the codelist https://vocabs.ccmm.cz/registry/codelist/RelationType/.

description.en: Type of the relation between the dataset and given resource.

usageNote.en: Use IRI identifier from the register http://publications.europa.eu/resource/authority/language.

Use IRI identifier from the register http://publications.europa.eu/resource/dataset/file-type. Human readable codelist representation is here: https://op.europa.eu/en/web/eu-vocabularies/concept-scheme/-/resource?uri=http://publications.europa.eu/resource/authority/file-type.

description.en: Format of downloadable file.

usageNote.en: Use IRI identifier from the register http://purl.org/coar/access_right/.

description.en: A statement about the access rights to the dataset.
Representation of time reference as a temporal interval or instant on which something relevant to the resource has happened.
description.es: Un intervalo temporal o un instante.

usageNote.en: Use for representation of time reference with zero extent or duration.

description.en: A temporal entity with zero extent or duration.
description.es: Una entidad temporal con una extensión o duración cero.

usageNote.en: Use for representation of time reference represented as an interval. Interval is represented by beginning and end time instants.
Use identifier scheme in the form of IRI identifier. Methodology shall list known sources.
Description of the resource may have also a description type.
Use value from codelist https://vocabs.ccmm.cz/registry/codelist/DescriptionType/.

description.en: An object representing time reference relevant to some event related to the resource has happened.

usageNote.en: In the core model, resource is anything that is described within the metadata record, including dataset itself and all related resources. This class is also reused in domain extension for representing any physical or digital resources specific for the described scientific domain.

description.en: A name given to the dataset.

usageNote.en: If TimeReference with dateType "Issued" is present, year in that date and publicationYear must be the same“

description.en: The code assigned by the funder to a sponsored award (grant).

usageNote.en: In case the award or grant has an ID or DOI, the full URL shall be included.

description.en: The human readable title or name of the award (grant).
Reference to the specific funding program.
Phone number

usageNote.en: Phone number in international format +xx(x) xxx xxx xxx

description.en: Email address.

usageNote.en: Email address in standard format, e.g. john.doe@domain.com

description.en: Code of the data box.
The given name associated with the person.
The family name associated with the person.
The date on which the metadata record was created.

usageNote.en: The date on which the metadata record was changed or modified.

description.en: A name given to the distribution.
The size of a Distribution in bytes.
A free-text account of the Distribution.

usageNote.en: This property can be repeated for parallel language versions of the description.

description.en: Descriptive text on details of rights and licensing.
The classification code used for notation of the subject term in the subject scheme.
Title of the subject.
Definition of the subject in the given context.

usageNote.en: Context is usually given by the subject scheme representing specific thesauri, vocabulary or simply a context (domain specific group at an university etc.).

description.en: Name of the spatial location.

usageNote.en:
Name of the place.
Examples: Prague Castle, Tour d'Eiffel, Šumava National Park

description.en: Bounding box of the location geometry.

usageNote.en: Typically defined by top-left and bottom-right corners.

description.en: Additional information to the date in text form.

usageNote.en: Write any additional information needed to understand the meaning of event that happened in the given time.

description.en: Value of the identifer within the given identifier scheme.
Human readable name of the repository.
Label of application profile
Label of the subject scheme.
Documentation label
Media type label.
File label
Label of geometry object.
Label of the validation result.
Provenance state label.
Address label
A human-readable name for the subject.
Funder name
Data service label
Resource agent role type label.

usageNote.en: Use label of the corresponding value from code list https://vocabs.ccmm.cz/registry/codelist/AgentRole/.

description.en: Human readable resolvable URL representing the resource.

usageNote.en: Resource URL represents human readable resolvable representation of the resource. Same url must be aslo in c:iri.

description.en: A lower case hexadecimal encoded digest value produced using a specific algorithm.

usageNote.en: Value is generated automatically using given algorithm.

description.en: Name of the agent.

usageNote.en: It is used for the official name of the agent. For Persons it is combination of first and family names. Recommended format is "family names, first names".

description.en: The complete address written as a string.

usageNote.en: Use of this property is recommended as it will not suffer any misunderstandings that might arise through the breaking up of an address into its component parts. This property is analogous to vCard's label property but with two important differences: (1) formatting is not assumed so that, unlike vCard label, it may not be suitable to print this on an address label, (2) vCard's label property has a domain of vCard Address; the fullAddress property has no such restriction. An example of a full address is "Champ de Mars, 5 Avenue Anatole France, 75007 Paris, France".

description.en: A location designator for a postal delivery point at a post office, usually a number.
The name of a passage or way through from one location to another.

usageNote.en: A thoroughfare is usually a street, but it might be a waterway or some other feature. For example, "Avenue des Champs-Élysées".

description.en: A number or sequence of characters that uniquely identifies the locator within the relevant scope.

usageNote.en: In simpler terms, this is the building number, apartment number, etc. For an address such as "Flat 3, 17 Bridge Street", the locator is "flat 3, 17".

description.en: Proper noun(s) applied to the real world entity identified by the locator. The locator name could be the name of the property or complex, of the building or part of the building, or it could be the name of a room inside a building.

usageNote.en:
The locator name could be the name of the property or complex, of the building or part of the building, or it could be the name of a room inside a building.

The key difference between a locator designator and a locator name is that the latter is a proper name and is unlikely to include digits. For example, "Shumann, Berlaymont" is a meeting room within the European Commission headquarters for which locator name is more appropriate than locator.

description.en: The name of a geographic area that groups Addresses.

usageNote.en: This would typically be part of a city, a neighbourhood or village, e.g. Montmartre. Address area is not an administrative unit.

description.en: A name created and maintained for postal purposes to identify a subdivision of addresses and postal delivery points.

usageNote.en: Usually a city, for example "Paris". Eventually name of the post itself.

description.en: The name of the uppermost level of the address, almost always a country.

usageNote.en: Best practice is to use the ISO 3166-1 code but if this is inappropriate for the context, country names should be provided in a consistent manner to reduce ambiguity. For example, either write 'France' or 'FRA' consistently throughout the dataset and avoid mixing the two. The Country controlled vocabulary from the Publications Office can be reused for this.

description.en: The name of a secondary level/region of the address, usually a county, state or other such area that typically encompasses several localities.

usageNote.en: Values could be a region or province, more granular than level 1.

description.en: The code created and maintained for postal purposes to identify a subdivision of addresses and postal delivery points.

usageNote.en: Post codes are common elements in many countries' postal address systems. One of the many post codes of Paris is for example "75000".

description.en: Label of the license document.
Label of format value.

usageNote.en: Use a label of a codelist value from http://publications.europa.eu/resource/dataset/file-type.

description.en: Language label

usageNote.en: Use language label and/or its 3-letter code from http://publications.europa.eu/resource/authority/language/.

description.en: Label of the access rights vocabulary value.

usageNote.en: Short label of the value from register http://purl.org/coar/access_right/. Allowed English values are 'embargoes access', 'metadata only access', 'open access' and 'restricted access'.

description.en: Label of the resource type.
Position of an instant, expressed using xsd:date.

usageNote.en: Each time instant SHALL have exactly one date OR date time stamp attribute.

description.en: Date type label.
Label of the relation type.

usageNote.en: Use label of corresponding value from code list https://vocabs.ccmm.cz/registry/codelist/RelationType/.

description.en: Label of location relation type.
Alternate title type label.

usageNote.en: Use label of a respective value from https://vocabs.ccmm.cz/registry/codelist/AlternateTitle/.

description.en: Identifier scheme label

usageNote.en: E.g. DOI, ORCID etc...

description.en: Date with timestamp represented as xsd:dateTime.

usageNote.en:
Each time instant SHALL have exactly one date OR date time attribute.

Maintanance note: In the draft on newest version of Time ontology, in XSD date-time is deprecated and replaced with in XSD date-time-stamp.

description.en: Representation of geometry object as WKT Literal.
Representation of geometry object as GML Literal.
Label of the description type.

usageNote.en: This attribute shall be filled mainly for ORCiD identifiers of Persons. It serves to determine whether the person in the repository is really the person it is meant to be.

description.en: Reference to the resource in any way related to the described dataset.
Has reference for funding of a dataset acquisition.

usageNote.en: For the distribution of data in the form of files use instances of class Distribution – downloadable file. For the distribution of data through service use instance of class Distribution – data service.

description.en: Reference to the report about the dataset validation.
Dataset described using a subject.

usageNote.en: At least one subject must be a value from FRASCATI FORD vocabulary. For that subject use reference codelist https://vocabs.ccmm.cz/registry/codelist/SubjectCategory/ as the Subject scheme and select at least one value from this codelist as a subject.

description.en: Reference to events related to the dataset.

usageNote.en: Must contain at least one time reference with date type value "Created"  from  https://vocabs.ccmm.cz/registry/codelist/TimeReference/.

description.en: Specifies the agent an a given role in the relationship with the resource.

usageNote.en: May be used in a qualified-attribution to specify the role of an Agent with respect to an Entity. It is recommended that the value be taken from a controlled vocabulary of agent roles.

description.en: Relation to the agent entity of a funder.

description.es: Información relevante de contacto para el recurso catalogado. Se recomienda el uso de vCard.
description.it: Informazioni di contatto rilevanti per la risorsa catalogata. Si raccomanda l'uso di vCard.
description.en: Relevant contact information for the catalogued resource.
description.cs: Relevantní kontaktní informace pro katalogizovaný zdroj. Doporučuje se použít slovník VCard.
description.fr: Relie un jeu de données à une information de contact utile en utilisant VCard.
description.el: Συνδέει ένα σύνολο δεδομένων με ένα σχετικό σημείο επικοινωνίας, μέσω VCard.
description.ar: تربط قائمة البيانات بعنوان اتصال موصف  باستخدام VCard
description.ja: データセットを、VCardを用いて提供されている適切な連絡先情報にリンクします。
description.da: Relevante kontaktoplysninger for den katalogiserede ressource. Anvendelse af vCard anbefales.

usageNote.en: Either links to IRI of address in address registry or describes the address using Address class attributes.

description.en: Affiliation of the person to an organization.
An established standard to which the metadata record conforms.

usageNote.en: This property SHOULD be used to indicate the standard or profile that was used to describe cataloged resource content.

description.en: Link to the repository in which the metadata were originally stored and curated.

usageNote.en:
Original repository is a repository where the original metadata was harvested from or where it was created and/or published. There is always exactly one original repository. 
If metadata record is harvested form other repository, make sure to include the first repository from which it was harvested.

description.en: Dataset described by the metadata record.

usageNote.en: Download URL SHOULD be used for the URL at which this distribution is available directly, typically through a HTTP Get request.
The resource at the access URL contains information about how to get the Dataset. It shall be the web page (not a document file).

This property SHOULD be used when the media type of the distribution is defined in IANA (using value from https://www.iana.org/assignments/media-types/media-types.xhtml), otherwise Format MAY be used with values from Publication Office of the EU File type codelist http://publications.europa.eu/resource/dataset/file-type.

This property SHOULD be used to indicate the model, schema, ontology, view or profile that this representation of a dataset conforms to. This is (generally) a complementary concern to the media-type or format.
Access service SHOULD be used to link to a description of Data service that can provide access to this distribution.
This property SHOULD be used to indicate the profile or specification that this data service conforms to. This is (generally) a complementary concern to the service standard.

description.es: Información relevante de contacto para el recurso catalogado. Se recomienda el uso de vCard.
description.it: Informazioni di contatto rilevanti per la risorsa catalogata. Si raccomanda l'uso di vCard.
description.en: Contact point for the further details about the terms of use.
description.cs: Relevantní kontaktní informace pro katalogizovaný zdroj. Doporučuje se použít slovník VCard.
description.fr: Relie un jeu de données à une information de contact utile en utilisant VCard.
description.el: Συνδέει ένα σύνολο δεδομένων με ένα σχετικό σημείο επικοινωνίας, μέσω VCard.
description.ar: تربط قائمة البيانات بعنوان اتصال موصف  باستخدام VCard
description.ja: データセットを、VCardを用いて提供されている適切な連絡先情報にリンクします。
description.da: Relevante kontaktoplysninger for den katalogiserede ressource. Anvendelse af vCard anbefales.

description.en: Belonging of the subject to the subject scheme.

usageNote.en: In the CCMM spatial coverage does not only cover the area of dataset, it may be connected to the dataset in some other way, e.g. the place from where the data were measured, administrative area to which the dataset  conforms or other.

description.en: Relation to the spatial object.

usageNote.en: The relation is provided by the identifier of the related object. It shall be identifier of an existing spatial object in a registry, such as Place Named Authority List (http://publications.europa.eu/resource/authority/place), Register of Territorial Identification, Addresses and Real Estates or others.

The range of this property allows for any type of geometry specification. E.g., the geometry could be encoded by a literal, as WKT (geosparql:wktLiteral), or represented by a class, as geosparql:Geometry (or any of its subclasses).

description.en: has identifier
Inverse relation between dataset and metadata record.
has identifier

description.es: Enlace a una descripción de la relación con otro recurso.
description.it: Link a una descrizione di una relazione con un'altra risorsa.
description.en: Link to a description of a relationship between metadata record and agent with the specification of the role of agent in this relationship.
description.cs: Odkaz na popis vztahu s jiným zdrojem.
description.da: Reference til en beskrivelse af en relation til en anden ressource.

usageNote.en: Relationship shall contain at least one agent with role "Data Manager" from codelist https://vocabs.ccmm.cz/registry/codelist/AgentRole/.

description.en: Reference to the legal document giving official permission to do something with the resource.
A language used in the textual metadata describing titles, descriptions of the metadata record.
A primary language of the Dataset.
Any other languages of the Dataset.
Information about the conditions to access the resource or an indication of its security status.
Time instant representing the beginning of a temporal interval.
Time instant representing the end of a temporal interval.
Reference to the codelist of date types.
Relation to the relation type between dataset and resource.

usageNote.en: Use value from https://vocabs.ccmm.cz/registry/codelist/RelationType/.

description.en: Relation of the location to the dataset.

usageNote.en: Use values from codelist https://vocabs.ccmm.cz/registry/codelist/LocationRelation/.

description.en: Type of the alternate name relation.

usageNote.en: References to the value from https://vocabs.ccmm.cz/registry/codelist/AlternateTitle/.

description.en: Relation to the description of a dataset.

usageNote.en: Description may have various type from the codelist https://vocabs.ccmm.cz/registry/codelist/DescriptionType/.
Type of the description from the codelist https://vocabs.ccmm.cz/registry/codelist/DescriptionType/.
Link to a description of a relationship between resource and an agent with the specification of the role of agent in this relationship.

description.en: Reference to events related to the resource.
The resource type of the resource.

usageNote.en: Use IRI identifier of a value from the register https://vocabularies.coar-repositories.org/resource_types/.
